title: Supply Chain Manager - IndiGo Cargo - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - IndiGo Cargo - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the IndiGo Cargo family as a Supply Chain Manager in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IndiGo Cargo:
IndiGo Cargo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGo Cargo!
